files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,77 @@
+{
+  "version": "kc-mission-v1",
+  "name": "opencost-2748-var-configs-cloud-configurations-json-wrn-and-err-messages-filling",
+  "missionClass": "solution",
+  "author": "KubeStellar Bot",
+  "authorGithub": "kubestellar",
+  "mission": {
+    "title": "opencost: /var/configs/cloud-configurations.json WRN and ERR messages filling logs",
+    "description": "/var/configs/cloud-configurations.json WRN and ERR messages filling logs. Requested by 5+ users.",
+    "type": "feature",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Check current opencost deployment",
+        "description": "Verify your opencost version and configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n opencost -l app.kubernetes.io/name=opencost\nhelm list -n opencost 2>/dev/null || echo \"Not installed via Helm\"\n```\nThis feature requires a working opencost installation."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Review opencost configuration",
+        "description": "Inspect the relevant opencost configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get all -n opencost -l app.kubernetes.io/name=opencost\nkubectl get configmap -n opencost -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=opencost\n```\nThe logs are full of the following messages: \n\n```\n2024-05-14T07:36:43.43448165Z WRN Controller: pullWatchers: failed to load config statuses from file: open /var/configs/cloud-configurations.json: no such file or directory."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Apply the fix for /var/configs/cloud-configurations.json WRN and ERR messages…",
+        "description": "## What does this PR change?\nThis PR adds a memory backed config controller which can be used when there is no PV to back the cloud config controllers state. As is this is the only way the config controller will be run in OpenCost. \nDoing this prevents errors such as\n```yaml\n2024-05-14T07:36:43.43448165Z WRN Controller: pullWatchers: failed to load config statuses from file: open /var/configs/cloud-configurations.json: no such file or directory. Proceeding to create the file\n2024-05-14T07:36:43.43465676Z ERR Controller: pullWatchers: failed to save statuses failed to save config statuses to file: open /var/configs/cloud-configurations.json: no such file or directory\n```"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Verify the feature works",
+        "description": "Test that the new capability is working as expected:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n opencost -l app.kubernetes.io/name=opencost\nkubectl get events -n opencost --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10\n```\nConfirm the feature described in \"/var/configs/cloud-configurations.json WRN and ERR messages…\" is functioning correctly."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "## What does this PR change?\nThis PR adds a memory backed config controller which can be used when there is no PV to back the cloud config controllers state. As is this is the only way the config controller will be run in OpenCost.",
+      "codeSnippets": [
+        "2024-05-14T07:36:43.43448165Z WRN Controller: pullWatchers: failed to load config statuses from file: open /var/configs/cloud-configurations.json: no such file or directory. Proceeding to create the file\n2024-05-14T07:36:43.43465676Z ERR Controller: pullWatchers: failed to save statuses failed to save config statuses to file: open /var/configs/cloud-configurations.json: no such file or directory",
+        "opencost:\n  cloudCost:\n    enabled: false",
+        "2024-05-14T07:36:43.43448165Z WRN Controller: pullWatchers: failed to load config statuses from file: open /var/configs/cloud-configurations.json: no such file or directory. Proceeding to create the file\n2024-05-14T07:36:43.43465676Z ERR Controller: pullWatchers: failed to save statuses failed to save config statuses to file: open /var/configs/cloud-configurations.json: no such file or directory"
+      ]
+    }
+  },
+  "metadata": {
+    "tags": [
+      "opencost",
+      "incubating",

+      "feature"
+    ],

+    },

+  },
